prompt: A detailed 19th-century naturalist scientific illustration, plate composition, 2048x2048 resolution. A cross-sectional landscape of rolling hills and valleys, rendered with fine ink linework, delicate cross-hatching, and muted watercolor washes in earthy greens and browns. Multiple small paths descend from different elevations along the hillsides, each path marked subtly by worn trails or footprints, all converging toward the lowest central basin. The terrain is carefully observed with botanical elements such as grasses and small plants drawn in precise naturalist style. Composition resembles a field study plate with layered terrain and directional flow downward. Parchment-like background texture, minimal shading gradients, hand-drawn precision. No text, no labels, no numbers, no symbols. Ensure ultra high resolution, minimum 2048px on both dimensions, crisp linework, historically accurate illustration style.
tradition_approach: Fine ink linework, cross-hatching, muted watercolor washes, and observational botanical detail arranged as a scientific plate to mirror naturalist illustration while embedding directional descent.
